channel.title: Vlookup on Stupid Spreadsheets
channel.description: Recent content in Vlookup on Stupid Spreadsheets

item.title: Simple Lookup Functions for Excel and Google Sheets
item.description: 1. The Most Simple Functions Vlookup/Hlookup This is a simple, yet powerful function used to look for a value vertically. 2. Best Friends Forever Index & Match 3. Multiple Columns DGET - A Handsome Boy
